title: Savory Spanish Chorizo Empanadas
description: A savory, crumbly Spanish dish featuring chorizo and wholegrain mustard, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings. These empanadas are gluten-free-friendly and can be broiled to perfection.

ingredients.name: gluten-free all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: contains rice flour, potato starch, and tapioca flour

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the gluten-free flour, cold butter, and a pinch of salt. Use a pastry blender or your fingers to work the butter into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add the beaten egg to the flour mixture, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together in a ball.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the sliced chorizo, wholegrain mustard, and a pinch of black pepper.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the chilled dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Use a round cookie cutter or the rim of a glass to cut out circles of dough.
Place a tablespoon of the chorizo mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half over the filling, pressing the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with olive oil and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil the empanadas for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
